original.selection_notes: Baseline — no evidence reading order, no MCP fallback, no inline approval bar, no stopping rule, underspecified blocker reporting

student.selection_notes: Teacher approved for write-back after adversary fix (MCP partial failure guard updated). All six engineer-prompt issues resolved.

adversary.selection_notes: Exploit 1 (partial MCP failure graceful degradation) was credible (0.93 vs 0.88). Fix applied to student candidate before write-back. Exploit pattern blocked in adversary steering summary.

decision: Student candidate approved after adversary fix. Validation: 856 passed.
